scope: second org_review manual decision batch; fix deterministic Stanford duplicates and normalize display labels while keeping true suborg/history boundaries separate

decisions.reason: Stanford HAI and Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence (HAI) refer to the same Stanford center; keep other Stanford departments, labs, and university-level rows separate.
Stanford University, Sequoia Professor is a position-bearing Stanford role, not a distinct organization; repoint the endowed-chair role to Stanford University.
Normalize People.organization display labels to canonical English organization names while keeping Facebook, FAIR, Meta AI, MetaMind, Metaweb, and Meta Superintelligence Labs separate.
Keep Stanford University, Stanford Computer Science Department, SAIL, Stanford HAI, Stanford Digital Economy Lab, CRFM, and Stanford Vision Lab as separate displayable affiliations.
Keep New York University, NYU Courant, and NYU Tandon separate because university, institute, and school-level affiliations carry different display meaning.
Keep Carnegie Mellon University, CMU Computer Science Department, and NeuLab @ LTI/CMU separate because school/lab affiliations are more specific than the parent university.
Keep Facebook, Meta, Facebook AI Research (FAIR), Meta AI, MetaMind, Metaweb, and Meta Superintelligence Labs separate because they represent different historical employers, labs, products, or teams.
Keep Twitter, Twitter/X transition rows, X Corp., and X.com separate because historical roles and acquisition/founding context differ.
Keep CAS ICT, CAS Graduate School, Institute of Biophysics, Institute of Software, parent Chinese Academy of Sciences, and the automation institute lab separate.
Keep IBM and IBM Research separate because corporate leadership roles and research-lab affiliations are distinct.
Keep SBS & University of British Columbia separate from University of British Columbia until the SBS context has direct source support.
Keep King's College, Cambridge and King's College, New Zealand separate because they are different institutions.
